name: sod gate: when profile does not require sod_gate_on_critical_paths the gate exits 0 even with no verifier output
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/verify && printf 'require:\n  sod_gate_on_critical_paths: false\n' > profile.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/sod-gate.sh" --pr-sha abc123 --verifier-output "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/verify/abc123.json" --profile "$PWD/profile.yaml" --enforce && echo ok 1>&2
